g.text: without STM: explicit locks require careful ordering to avoid deadlock
with STM: compose reads and writes freely — runtime prevents conflicts
Thread 2 locks B then A — deadlock if Thread 1 holds A

g.title: atomically commits all writes at once, or retries the whole transaction on conflict. No locks to order.
atomically commits all writes at once, or retries the whole transaction on conflict. No locks to order.
